mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_agent_events(project_id, type, agent_id, task_id, message, occurred_at) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{description.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description.agent, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.task, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.message}, COALESCE(#{description.occurredAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM project_agent_events WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
